qa_pairs.question: After submitting an interactive application job in Open OnDemand, where will you be directed?
qa_pairs.answer: After clicking the 'Launch' button to submit your job to the queue, you will be taken to the 'My Interactive Sessions' page.

qa_pairs.question: What settings can be adjusted to improve the performance of a Trillium Desktop session, especially with a slow internet connection?
qa_pairs.answer: Once your Trillium Desktop job is running, you have the option to improve the 'Image Quality' and 'Image Compression' of the desktop session. Depending on the speed of your internet connection, you may want to set these lower to improve performance and responsiveness of the desktop.

qa_pairs.question: How do you launch the Trillium Desktop environment after an interactive session has started running?
qa_pairs.answer: Once your job is running on the 'My Interactive Sessions' page, you can click on the 'Connect to Trillium Desktop' button to launch the remote desktop environment in a new browser tab.
